appconfig.configurationprofile.validator: A validator provides a syntactic or semantic check to ensure the configuration that you want to deploy functions as intended. To validate your application configuration data, you provide a schema or an AWS Lambda function that runs against the configuration. The configuration deployment or update can only proceed when the configuration data is valid.

appconfig.configurationprofile.validator.Description: Either the JSON Schema content or the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an Lambda function.
AWS AppConfig supports validators of type `JSON_SCHEMA` and `LAMBDA`
